rationale: The text "cafe\u0301" (Latin small letter e followed by a combining acute accent, U+0301) encoded as raw UTF-8 without NFC normalization. dCBOR's D8 requires NFC normalization (the precomposed "caf\u00e9" form); rfc8949-profile-1 has no such rule (P9 is an explicit non-goal), so this reason code is dcbor-only.
